untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'support level in uptrend' and 'resistance level in downtrend' which are not available as explicit indicators in the allowed list. These would need to be defined via pivot points (s1/r1) or custom level tracking external to the indicator set. Additionally, 'rejection candle pattern' requires precise wick-to-body ratio thresholds not specified in the original signal.
translation_notes: Approximated rejection candle logic using lower_wick > body (uptrend) and upper_wick > body (downtrend). Used sma_20 as proxy for trend confirmation. Support/resistance levels (s1, r1 from pivots) could be integrated if the signal author specifies exact thresholds. Stop loss position marked 'as on chart' requires manual specification per trade instance.
